rationale: Reduce Windows CLI arg-length risk by standardizing payload-to-file usage and limiting inline prompt size via a small procedural config file.

edits.content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.cli_safety.v1",
  "use_payload_file": true,
  "max_inline_chars": 1200,
  "prefer_file_args": true,
  "truncate_strategy": "head_tail",
  "head_chars": 600,
  "tail_chars": 400,
  "note": "Keep command-line args short on Windows by passing large payloads via temp files."
}

risks: May be ignored if no loader consumes this config; low risk as it is additive.
expected_benefit: Provides a single, small config artifact to guide future runs toward file-based payloads and shorter CLI arguments on Windows.
